title: equisetum × schaffneri
intro: Equisetum × schaffneri, also known as Schaffner's horsetail, is a hybrid plant species of the genus Equisetum, which is a type of vascular plant that has been around since the time of the dinosaurs. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating urinary tract issues and kidney problems due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Equisetum × schaffneri include improving kidney function, reducing blood pressure, and aiding in the treatment of certain types of cancer. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be found in capsule or tincture form in some herbal supplements.
